title: redstono's swords and armor
description: this mod adds a massive lineup of armor and tools crafted from familiar Minecraft items like Copper, Netherrack, Deepslate, Obsidian, Lapis, Endstone—even Dirt and Dried Kelp. With over a dozen new material sets, players can equip themed gear that match
body:
What's Added?
- Copper Gear
Includes armor and full tool lineup—perfect for players seeking mid-tier upgrades without waiting for diamonds.
- Netherack & Deepslate Sets
Tap into the Nether and deep underground to forge rugged gear with thematic punch.
-, Endstone & Lapis Kits
Late-game materials get some love with full armor/tool sets offering some durability and mystique.
- Unconventional Armor
Try out Dirt Armor, Cobblestone Armor, Oak Armor, and even Dried Kelp Armor—because fashion is survival.
- Complete Tool Sets
Every material listed above includes a shovel, pickaxe, axe, hoe, and sword—making this mod fully compatible with farming, fighting, and mining workflows.
- Obsidian kit, this set is for mid-late game. it is better then netherite



anybody can use this mod in any modpack
